mission.title: helm: Proposal: helm commandeer
mission.description: Proposal: helm commandeer. Requested by 61+ users.

steps.title: Check current helm setup
steps.description:
Verify your helm version and configuration:
```bash
helm version --short
```
This feature requires a working helm installation.

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant helm configuration:
Many users want to be able to "adopt" currently running pods, services, etc. into a new or existing chart.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Proposal: helm commandeer
steps.description:
First off, I think this is a great feature, and I personally love the name "commandeer" (though maybe "adopt" is a little more consistent and easier for people like me to spell).

I am duty bound to ask the question I am notorious for: _Should this be a plugin?_ 😄 

Okay, with that out of the
```yaml
$ helm commandeer --name=myNewChart deployment:www-frontend service:www-gateway configmap:www-config
Generated chart myNewChart
Added Deployment www-frontend
Added Service www-gateway
Added ConfigMap www-config
Chart myNewChart is released as myNewChart.v1
```

steps.title: Upgrade helm to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade helm:
```bash
# Check current version
helm version --short
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/helm/helm
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Proposal: helm commandeer" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
First off, I think this is a great feature, and I personally love the name "commandeer" (though maybe "adopt" is a little more consistent and easier for people like me to spell).

I am duty bound to ask the question I am notorious for: _Should this be a plugin?_ 😄 

Okay, with that out of the way....

Here's a different way we _could_ approach the same issue.
codeSnippets:
$ helm commandeer --name=myNewChart deployment:www-frontend service:www-gateway configmap:www-config
Generated chart myNewChart
Added Deployment www-frontend
Added Service www-gateway
Added ConfigMap www-config
Chart myNewChart is released as myNewChart.v1

prerequisites.description: A working helm installation or development environment.
